de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class SemisequentTacletAppIndex

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.SemisequentTacletAppIndex

  • public class SemisequentTacletAppIndex
extends java.lang.Object
    This class holds TermTacletAppIndexs for all formulas of a semisequent.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      SemisequentTacletAppIndex addTaclets(RuleFilter filter, Sequent s, Services services, TacletIndex tacletIndex, NewRuleListener listener)

      SemisequentTacletAppIndex sequentChanged(SequentChangeInfo sci, Services services, TacletIndex tacletIndex, NewRuleListener listener)
      called if a formula has been replaced

      • getTacletAppAt

        public ImmutableList<NoPosTacletApp> getTacletAppAt(PosInOccurrence pos,

        all taclet apps for the given position

      • getTacletAppAtAndBelow

        public ImmutableList<TacletApp> getTacletAppAtAndBelow(PosInOccurrence pos,
                                                       RuleFilter filter,
                                                       Services services)
        Returns:
        all taclet apps for or below the given position

      • sequentChanged

        public SemisequentTacletAppIndex sequentChanged(SequentChangeInfo sci,
                                                Services services,
                                                TacletIndex tacletIndex,
                                                NewRuleListener listener)
        called if a formula has been replaced
        Parameters:

      • addTaclets

                                            Services services,
                                            TacletIndex tacletIndex,
